text: Have you ever noticed that a frisbie looks like a plate or a pan? In the old days, people sometimes compared a frisbie to simple kitchen items.
Many early frisbies were pans, pie pans. Before plastic toys became popular, people often tossed old frisbies back and forth for fun.
The students would yell frisbie as they played catch. When one student threw the pan, the others listened for the word frisbie.
The word frisbie was stamped on the pan. Because the word frisbie was easy to see, students began saying frisbie out loud while they played.
